zh.title: AI
zh.oneLiner: AI 是让机器模拟人类智能的技术总称。
zh.beginnerExplanation: AI 就像一个会学习的助手。你给它看很多例子，它就能总结规律，然后帮你做事，比如写文章、画图、写代码。
zh.technicalExplanation: AI 是研究让计算机系统执行通常需要人类智能的任务的领域，包括感知、推理、学习、决策和自然语言处理等。
zh.whyItMatters: AI 是 Vibe Coding 时代的基础。理解 AI，是理解 LLM、Agent、RAG 等概念的起点。
zh.vibeCodingUsage: 你用 Claude Code、Cursor、ChatGPT 时，本质上都在调用 AI 来帮你写代码、改 bug、做设计。
commonMisunderstandings: AI 不等于 LLM，LLM 只是 AI 的一种
AI 不是无所不能，它会出错、会幻觉
AI 不是真的‘理解’你说的话，它是在做概率预测
zh.promptExample: 请用小白能理解的方式解释 AI，并举一个 Vibe Coding 中调用 AI 的例子。

en.title: AI
en.oneLiner: AI is the umbrella term for technology that lets machines simulate human intelligence.
en.beginnerExplanation: Think of AI as a learning assistant. Show it many examples, and it can spot patterns and help you do things — write text, generate images, write code.
en.technicalExplanation: AI is the field of building computer systems that perform tasks typically requiring human intelligence: perception, reasoning, learning, decision-making, and natural language processing.
en.whyItMatters: AI is the foundation of the Vibe Coding era. Understanding AI is the starting point for understanding LLMs, agents, RAG, and more.
en.vibeCodingUsage: When you use Claude Code, Cursor, or ChatGPT, you are calling AI to write code, fix bugs, and design features.
commonMisunderstandings: AI is not the same as LLM — LLM is one kind of AI
AI is not all-knowing; it makes mistakes and hallucinates
AI does not truly 'understand' you — it predicts probabilities
en.promptExample: Explain AI in a beginner-friendly way and give one example of using AI in Vibe Coding.

zh.title: LLM
zh.oneLiner: LLM 是用海量文本训练出来、能理解和生成语言的大模型。
zh.beginnerExplanation: LLM 就像一个看过无数本书的人，你问它任何问题，它都能根据‘读过的内容’给你一个看起来合理的回答。
zh.technicalExplanation: LLM 是基于 Transformer 架构、用大规模文本语料训练的语言模型，通过预测下一个 token 来生成文本。
zh.whyItMatters: LLM 是 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini、DeepSeek 的底层引擎，也是 Vibe Coding 的核心动力。
zh.vibeCodingUsage: Claude Code 背后是 Claude 这个 LLM；Cursor 背后是 GPT、Claude 等多种 LLM。你写 Prompt 让 LLM 帮你写代码就是 Vibe Coding 的常规操作。
commonMisunderstandings: LLM 不是搜索引擎，它没有实时联网
LLM 不会真的‘思考’，它在做概率预测
LLM 会幻觉，回答需要核实
zh.promptExample: 请用小白能理解的方式解释 LLM，并说明它和搜索引擎的区别。

en.title: LLM
en.oneLiner: An LLM is a large model trained on huge amounts of text that can understand and generate language.
en.beginnerExplanation: An LLM is like someone who has read countless books. Ask it anything, and it gives a reasonable-sounding answer based on what it has read.
en.technicalExplanation: An LLM is a Transformer-based language model trained on large text corpora that generates text by predicting the next token.
en.whyItMatters: LLMs power ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and DeepSeek — and they are the core engine of Vibe Coding.
en.vibeCodingUsage: Claude Code runs on the Claude LLM; Cursor runs on multiple LLMs. Writing prompts that ask an LLM to code for you is the daily routine of Vibe Coding.
commonMisunderstandings: An LLM is not a search engine — it is not connected to live web by default
An LLM does not truly 'think' — it predicts probabilities
en.promptExample: Explain LLM in a beginner-friendly way and contrast it with a search engine.
